earningsCalendar.note: Earnings beat by $0.14 ($0.57 actual). Strong architectural glass demand. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK. expectedMove verisi kaynaktan alinamadi.
EPS beat by $0.03 ($3.66 actual), revenue $3.72B vs $3.73B est (hafif miss). Olive Garden/LongHorn strength. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK. expectedMove verisi kaynaktan alinamadi.
Massive beat: EPS $4.85 vs $4.07 cons, revenue $19.57B vs $16.80B. Stock -3.5% on softer Q3 guidance. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK. expectedMove verisi kaynaktan alinamadi.
Flat YoY EPS expected. Revenue growth +14.4%. Consumer staples defensive. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK. expectedMove verisi kaynaktan alinamadi.
Lighting/industrial demand. Stock +1.28%. priorEps ve priorRev verisi kaynaktan hizli alinamadi. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK.
Cybersecurity/IoT turnaround play. Stock +8.51%. priorEps ve priorRev verisi kaynaktan hizli alinamadi. IV crush aktif — 0DTE YASAK.

vwapNotes: SPY VWAP ustunde (+$2.00), QQQ VWAP ustunde (+$2.82), IWM VWAP ustunde (+$0.46). Tum major indexler VWAP ustunde — risk-on bias. SPY gap up acilis (730.40) sonrasi 736.53 high yaparak continuation gosterdi. Gap fill riski dusuk. Semiconductors (ON, INTC, NVDA) VWAP altinda zayif, tech mega-caps (MSFT, AAPL) VWAP ustunde guclu. Clean energy/biotech (FCEL, MRNA, SLS) VWAP ustunde momentum guclu.

riskAssessment.vixRegime: VIX ~20.14, elevated-normal borderline. 15-20 normal, 20-30 elevated. Opsiyon primleri yuksek, directional trade costlari artmis.
riskAssessment.sectorRotation: Semiconductors zayif (ON -21.87%, NVDA -0.74%, INTC -3.01%). Clean Energy/Biotech guclu (FCEL +26%, MRNA +13%, SLS +13%). Tech mega-caps karisik (MSFT +5%, AAPL +0.7%). Consumer staples (MKC +4.9%) defensive alim.
riskAssessment.earningsRisk: Bugun 6+ onemli earnings aciklandi (APOG, DRI, SNX, MKC, AYI, BB). IV crush aktif. Earnings hisselerinde 0DTE YASAK. SNX buyuk beat'e ragmen guidance endisesiyle dusuyor.
riskAssessment.macroRisk: Geopolitical risk hafifliyor (Iran peace talks, Strait of Hormuz). Petrol fiyatlari dusus trendinde. FOMC bekleniyor. ABD piyasasi karisik, breadth zayif.
